lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Nilsal, and welcome to Nemus Retreat. Can I get you a drink?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Like I said, this is Nemus Retreat. Back during the War of Betrayal, this was a military camp for Imafore's army, run by none other than General Nemus himself!

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: General Nemus is something of a hero in these parts. Towards the end of the war, the forces of Kourend had mostly taken the Auburn Valley.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: As a result, Imafore ordered General Nemus to burn the entire valley to the ground to stop the Kourend advance. Many would have died on both sides, but Nemus refused the order.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Imafore had him executed as a traitor, but in doing so he lost the support of all of Nemus' troops.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a bit of a shortsighted decision.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Indeed. Imafore presumably hoped to make an example of Nemus, but instead his decision was one of the final mistakes that ultimately led to his defeat a few months later.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Anyway, ever since the war ended, this place has remained here as something of a monument to Nemus. Of course, rather than a military camp, it now acts as a nice stop off for travellers such as yourself.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: And on that note, can I get you a drink?
